column.name: meta_description
column.value: Support firm operations, vendor coordination and internal process quality in Hong Kong.

insert.column:
IMan Investment is hiring a Platform Operations Associate in Hong Kong to support day-to-day firm operations, vendor coordination and process quality as the platform expands across regions.
This role suits an organised operator who enjoys building reliable systems behind an investment firm.

• Coordinate vendors, office operations and internal service workflows • Support onboarding logistics, travel and event coordination for the investment team • Maintain operating checklists, trackers and documentation standards • Assist finance and compliance colleagues with information gathering and follow-ups • Improve process quality across tools used by the Hong Kong platform • Partner with regional teams on cross-border operational requests

• 2–4 years in operations, executive support, fund administration or related roles • Excellent organisation, ownership and written English • Comfortable with spreadsheets, documentation tools and multi-stakeholder coordination • Experience in Hong Kong professional services or investment environments preferred • Mandarin proficiency is a plus
• Competitive associate compensation • Medical coverage and hybrid Hong Kong flexibility • Exposure to a growing cross-border investment platform • Mentorship from senior operations leadership

column.name: meta_description
column.value: Lead recruiting and people operations for IMan’s growing global investment platform.

insert.column:
IMan Investment is hiring a Talent & People Partner to own recruiting quality and people operations as we hire across Hong Kong, New York and regional Partner seats.
You will design thoughtful hiring processes, support candidate experience and help build a high-trust internal culture.

• Own end-to-end recruiting for investment, banking, legal and regional Partner roles • Improve careers messaging, scorecards and interview loops • Partner with hiring managers on prioritisation and offer processes • Support onboarding and people operations for a distributed team • Maintain employer-brand consistency across public careers content • Advise leadership on capacity planning and role sequencing

• 5–9 years in talent acquisition or people partnering within finance, consulting or high-growth environments • Experience hiring senior / Partner-level candidates preferred • Excellent candidate communication and process discipline • Comfortable working across Asia and US time zones • Bachelor’s degree required
• Competitive people-partner compensation • Hybrid Hong Kong base with remote flexibility • Direct impact on firm-building and culture • Cross-border hiring exposure

column.name: meta_title
column.value: Research Associate · Sector Mapping · IMan Investment

column.name: meta_description
column.value: Build sector maps and founder landscapes that feed IMan’s global investment coverage.

insert.column:
IMan Investment is hiring a Research Associate to build sector maps, founder landscapes and thematic briefs that support global investment coverage.
This remote-friendly role is ideal for an analytically strong researcher who enjoys turning fragmented market information into clear coverage tools.

• Build and maintain sector maps across AI, healthcare, climate, fintech and related themes • Track funding signals, competitive moves and policy catalysts by region • Produce concise research notes for Associates, Managers and Partners • Support diligence with secondary research packs and expert shortlists • Improve research templates and knowledge organisation for the investment team

• 1–3 years in research, consulting, venture scouting or related analytical work • Strong synthesis and writing skills in English • Comfortable with remote collaboration and deadline-driven research requests • Interest in early-stage technology markets • Additional language skills are a plus
• Competitive research associate compensation • Fully remote / global flexibility • Mentorship from the investment team • Direct contribution to live coverage and deal work

column.name: meta_description
column.value: Support LP communications, reporting cadence and relationship logistics for IMan Investment.

insert.column:
IMan Investment is hiring an Investor Relations Coordinator in Hong Kong to support LP communications, reporting logistics and relationship management for the firm.
You will help ensure a polished, timely IR cadence as IMan’s global platform grows.

• Coordinate LP reporting calendars, meeting logistics and follow-up materials • Maintain CRM hygiene and relationship trackers for institutional contacts • Support preparation of updates, one-pagers and meeting briefs • Liaise with finance/operations on data needed for LP packages • Assist with event and roadshow coordination across regions

• 2–5 years in investor relations, client service, fund operations or related roles • Excellent written English and attention to detail • Strong organisational skills and discretion with confidential information • Experience in Hong Kong or Asia Pacific investment environments preferred
• Competitive coordinator compensation • Medical coverage and hybrid Hong Kong arrangements • Exposure to institutional LP processes • Growth path within a scaling investment platform
